title: 続きを/voteで続けて。 • consensus mode の前提を確認します。まず Claude と GLM の live lane を起動できるかを確認し、同時に現在の auth- stale 導線設計を維持したまま continuation 可能かを見ます。 • Ran which glm └ glm not found • Explored └ Read agent-glm-general-reviewer.json, agent-claude-general-reviewer.json ────────────────────────────────────────────────...
summary_text: - **Core divergence (fallback gating):** CI runner attempts Copilot for Claude lanes whenever Copilot is available (`execute_copilot_claude ... || true`) before direct Claude API attempts, independent of strict flag ([ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh):617). Subscription runner blocks Copilot fallback behind `strict_opus_assist_direct != true` for *all* Claude lanes ([subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh):793). This is the branch that caused non-opus lane fallback suppression. - **Strict scope mismatch:** In CI, strict is enforced as a final fail-closed check only for `claude-opus-assist` ([ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh):775). Subscription has the same final guard ([subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh):909), but additionally uses strict as a precondition for Copilot fallback ([subscription-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/subscription-agent-runner.sh):793). - **Policy handling gap:** CI supports `CLAUDE_ASSIST_EXECUTION_POLICY` (`direct|hybrid|proxy`) and corresponding Claude-unavailable branches ([ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh):21, [ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh):236, [ci-agent-runner.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/scripts/harness/ci-agent-runner.sh):276). Subscription runner has no equivalent policy branch (`rg` hit only in CI file). - **Minimal branches to mirror for local subscription mode:** - Mirror CI’s Claude fallback ordering/condition: allow Copilot attempt when available regardless of strict precondition; keep strict enforcement only at final `claude-opus-assist` guard. - Mirror CI’s policy parse/default block for `CLAUDE_ASSIST_EXECUTION_POLICY` so local subscription can honor `direct|hybrid|proxy` intent consistently. - Mirror CI’s explicit “direct unavailable”/“proxy unavailable” skip semantics (or local equivalent) so failures are policy-explainable instead of generic `claude-cli-failed`. - **Concrete evidence from recent artifact:** failed lane was non-opus (`claude-general-reviewer`) with only Claude attempt trace and no Copilot attempt: `model_attempts: claude:claude-sonnet-4-6:exit1`, `execution_route: claude-cli-failed` ([agent-claude-general-reviewer.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/agent-claude-general-reviewer.json):2, [agent-claude-general-reviewer.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/agent-claude-general-reviewer.json):11, [agent-claude-general-reviewer.json](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/agent-claude-general-reviewer.json):24). - **Test cases to add (minimal):** - `subscription-non-opus-strict-true-still-copilot-fallback`: `AGENT_NAME=claude-general-reviewer`, failing Claude CLI, `HAS_COPILOT_CLI=true`, `STRICT_OPUS_ASSIST_DIRECT=true` should still end `execution_route=claude-via-copilot-cli`. - `subscription-opus-strict-true-rejects-indirect`: keep existing behavior; ensure `claude-opus-assist` still fails closed if route is copilot/proxy. - `subscription-policy-proxy-without-copilot`: `CLAUDE_ASSIST_EXECUTION_POLICY=proxy`, no Copilot, verify proxy fallback/skip branch is hit deterministically. - `subscription-policy-hybrid-direct-unavailable`: direct Claude unavailable + no Copilot + hybrid policy should take configured fallback branch rather than generic CLI-failed. - **Current coverage gap:** `tests/test-agent-runner-provider-compat.sh` has many Claude/Copilot tests, but no `CLAUDE_ASSIST_EXECUTION_POLICY` coverage (`rg` no matches).
